description: Generic analog input, analog output, and digital input instrument profile. Used for control loops with analog measurement, analog command, and a digital feedback input. Includes Bypass parameter. No operating mode parameter (see AI_AO_DI_M for mode-capable variant).
applicableTo: Instruments with analog measurement, analog command output, and digital input feedback (AI + AO + DI)

attributes.name: TagName
attributes.description: ISA-5.1 instrument tag identifier

attributes.name: ShortName
attributes.description: Human-readable equipment name used in UNS topic path

attributes.name: ProfileDefinition
attributes.description: URL to the SM Profile definition that this instance conforms to

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: Free-text description of the equipment instance

attributes.name: Area
attributes.description: ISA-95 area designation

attributes.name: Unit
attributes.description: ISA-95 unit designation

IO.description: Process I/O - analog input, analog output, digital input bound to field instruments via MQTT

attributes.name: AI_Feedback
attributes.description: Measured process variable from field instrument

attributes.name: AO_Command
attributes.description: Analog command setpoint sent to field instrument

attributes.name: DI_Feedback
attributes.description: Digital status feedback from field instrument (true = active)

Parameters.description: Configurable parameters for alarm setpoints, output clamps, alarm enables, and bypass

attributes.name: High_High_Sp
attributes.description: High-High alarm setpoint for AI_Feedback

attributes.name: High_Sp
attributes.description: High alarm setpoint for AI_Feedback

attributes.name: Low_Sp
attributes.description: Low alarm setpoint for AI_Feedback

attributes.name: Low_Low_Sp
attributes.description: Low-Low alarm setpoint for AI_Feedback

attributes.name: High_High_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable High-High limit alarm

attributes.name: High_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable High limit alarm

attributes.name: Low_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable Low limit alarm

attributes.name: Low_Low_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable Low-Low limit alarm

attributes.name: Out_Min
attributes.description: Minimum output clamp value

attributes.name: Out_Max
attributes.description: Maximum output clamp value

attributes.name: AI_Bad_Alarm_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable bad quality alarm on analog input

attributes.name: AO_Bad_Alarm_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable bad quality alarm on analog output

attributes.name: DI_Bad_Alarm_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable bad quality alarm on digital input

attributes.name: Bypass
attributes.description: Control is bypassed (ignored by control logic)

attributes.name: Operator
attributes.description: Operator acknowledgment or manual override flag

attributes.name: Maintenance
attributes.description: Equipment is in maintenance mode

attributes.name: OOS
attributes.description: Equipment is out of service

attributes.name: Interlocked
attributes.description: Equipment is interlocked (prevented from operating)

attributes.name: ResetReq
attributes.description: Reset request flag (clear alarm or fault condition)

Alarms.description: Reference tags for Ignition alarm evaluation. Each tag's value mirrors an IO process variable that an Ignition alarm property evaluates against. Alarm active/inactive state is not published in this profile version.

attributes.name: High_High
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to AI_Feedback PV for Ignition alarm evaluation

attributes.name: High
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to AI_Feedback PV for Ignition alarm evaluation

attributes.name: Low
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to AI_Feedback PV for Ignition alarm evaluation

attributes.name: Low_Low
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to AI_Feedback PV for Ignition alarm evaluation

attributes.name: AI_Bad_Quality
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to AI_Feedback PV for Ignition bad quality alarm evaluation

attributes.name: AO_Bad_Quality
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to AO_Command for Ignition bad quality alarm evaluation

attributes.name: DI_Bad_Quality
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to DI_Feedback for Ignition bad quality alarm evaluation

attributes.name: ESTOP
attributes.description: Memory tag for Ignition ESTOP alarm evaluation
